Pricing & usage

Simple plans for experimentation, solo operators, and storage-heavy teams.

This page frames the product like a real SaaS while still supporting your Telegram-backed object storage roadmap.

Starter
$0/mo

For testing the flow

  • • 1 workspace
  • • Basic uploads
  • • Transfer monitoring
Pro
$19/mo

For serious builders

  • • 10 workspaces
  • • Signed links
  • • URL imports
  • • Priority worker controls
Scale
$79/mo

For teams and operations

  • • Unlimited workspaces
  • • Advanced sharing
  • • Team controls
  • • Activity analytics

© 2026 TeleDrive. Built for nerds who want storage workflows without ugly tooling.
